stemHtml: When the BFO switch is used, what happens in the ADF?

options.a: The BFO circuit is activated, and the receiver accepts only A1A modulated signals.
options.c: The BFO circuit oscillates at an increased frequency in order to allow identification of A2A NDBs.
options.d: The BFO circuit imposes a tone onto the carrier wave to make the NDB's ident audible.
